name: Kintone
description: Cybozus cloud low-code business app builder — custom workflow, database and process apps with JavaScript APIs.

seo.title: Kintone — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Kintone: Cybozus cloud low-code business app builder — custom workflow, database and process apps with JavaScript APIs.

when_to_use: Custom business app built on low-code kintone with JS APIs
Approval workflow replacing email chains with structured forms
Operational database app for Japanese enterprise department
Salesforce-synced kintone workflow for Japanese CRM needs
Multi-step process app with conditional routing and records

cons: English docs less complete than JP
review.verdict: Japans default custom business app platform — capable but visually uncompetitive with modern low-code.
review.best_for: Japanese enterprises replacing spreadsheets with custom workflow and database apps
review.not_for: Teams wanting modern UX like Airtable, Notion, or Retool

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Standard subscription/seat plan; downgradable next cycle.
